title: Laravel Route Registration & Request Dispatch
activity_flow: START: Laravel application boots
RouteServiceProvider::boot() is called by the service container
boot() calls parent::boot() [Illuminate\Foundation\Support\Providers\RouteServiceProvider]
parent::boot() triggers map()
map() calls mapApiRoutes() first, then mapWebRoutes()
[mapApiRoutes] Route::prefix('api')->middleware('api')->namespace('App\Http\Controllers')->group('routes/api.php')
[Decision] routes/api.php has no routes defined → no API routes registered
[mapWebRoutes] Route::middleware('web')->namespace('App\Http\Controllers')->group('routes/web.php')
[routes/web.php] Registers: GET '/' → ExampleController@example (named 'example_route') with 'web' middleware group
Route registration complete → application ready to handle requests
--- REQUEST DISPATCH ---
HTTP Request arrives at Laravel HTTP Kernel
[Decision] Does incoming URI match a registered route?
YES: Route '/' matched → dispatch to ExampleController::example()
NO:  Return 404 response
ExampleController::example() executes
Action: error_log('This is the example action')
Returns: string 'Hi from Laravel 5.7 app!\n'
Laravel wraps return value as HTTP Response
END: HTTP Response sent to client
key_relationships: RouteServiceProvider uses Route facade to register route groups
conditions_and_branches: api.php is empty → no API routes registered (branch terminates early)
Request URI '/' matches web route → dispatch to ExampleController
Request URI does not match → 404 (implicit Laravel default)
method_signatures: RouteServiceProvider::mapWebRoutes(): void — registers 'web' middleware group from routes/web.php
RouteServiceProvider::mapApiRoutes(): void — registers 'api' middleware group + 'api' prefix from routes/api.php
ExampleController::example(): string — logs action, returns greeting string
important_notes: API routes file is empty; no API endpoints are registered
'web' middleware group provides: session state, CSRF protection, cookies
This is a Datadog PHP tracing test fixture — used to measure tracing overhead on a real Laravel app
